title: Taittiriya Upanishad II: The Five Sheaths
description: From the Taittiriya Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Taittiriya Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: From food are creatures produced. Whatever creatures dwell on the earth, they live indeed by food. By food alone they live. To food they return at the end. Within the food sheath is the breath sheath. Within the breath sheath is the mind sheath. Within the mind sheath is the knowledge sheath. Within the knowledge sheath is the bliss sheath.
